title: 'Ali Sends Out His Governors to the Garrison Cities
description: At the beginning of the year 36 `Ali despatched his governors. According to al-Sari (in writing)-Shu`ayb-Sayf-Muhammad and Talhah: `Ali sent his governors to the garrison cities: `Uthman b. Hunayf160 to al-Bagah; `Umarah b. Shihab, who had the merit of a hijrah,161 to al-Kufah, 'Ubaydallah b. 'Abbds162 to Yemen; Qays b. Sa'd'63 to Egypt; and Sahl b. Hunayf164 to Syria.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 16
